Video.summary: Hard Knocks 48 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! First up is the dynamic amateur bout Dylan Schellenberg vs. Gerra Gossen. This is immediately followed by amateurs Mike Parsons vs. debut Duncan Henry. Both of these fighters are keen to put up an entertaining fight for the audience. Don't miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 5
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 5

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 5

Video.summary: Peter Arbeau brings strong Muay Thai influences to his MMA matches. After travelling the world over constantly seeing out new training and competition experiences, Peter is more than re//ady for his next fight at HK37. This is an intense bout against an equally skilled Matt Krayco, with fists and legs flying.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau
Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau
Out of the Cage - Peter Arbeau

Best of 'M1', 'UCMMA' & 'Shock N Awe' Finishes

Video.summary: Motivated by watching UFC fights, Shawn Fitzsimmons was eager to start training in MMA. After a stint teaching self defense classes in Europe, Shawn is ready to prove his skills in the cage. As the main event at HK37, he takes on Ryan Dickson in the Lightweight division.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Image.alt: Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons
Out Of The Cage - Shawn Fitzsimmons

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda

KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda

Video.summary: It is Striker vs. Grappler! At Hard Knocks 50, John Woo and Jordan Van Heek fight an impressive short round. This episode of Out of the Cage focuses on John Woo and his path to his amateur debut fight.

Video.title: Out of the Cage - John Woo

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - John Woo

Video.summary: Peel back the curtain to find out the goals and challenges of a Mixed Martial Arts fighter’s everyday life, and how it’s not much different than yours. Featuring Colton Boxell.

Video.title: Day in the Life of a Fighter - Colton Boxell

Journey Fight Series VII - Luke Theriault v. Mike Wright
Journey Fight Series VII - Luke Theriault v. Mike Wright

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo

The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Josh Quayhagen vs. Vitalie Certan
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Josh Quayhagen vs. Vitalie Certan

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Josh Quayhagen vs. Vitalie Certan
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Josh Quayhagen vs. Vitalie Certan
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Josh Quayhagen vs. Vitalie Certan

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Ryan Connor HK43.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Ryan Connor
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Ryan Connor

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Ryan Connor
Out of the Cage - Ryan Connor
Out of the Cage - Ryan Connor

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Mike Davis
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Mike Davis
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Mike Davis

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Mike Davis
Fighter Profile: Mike Davis
Fighter Profile: Mike Davis

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Achraf Ouchen vs. Elhadji Ndour
